$comment: Output schema definitions. Referenced by harness_config.json agents via 'output_schema' key.

work_done.description: Concrete work completed this turn: files read, edits made, commands run. NOT plans or intentions.
Concrete work completed this turn: files read, edits made, commands run. NOT plans or intentions.
Concrete work completed this turn: files read, edits made, commands run. NOT plans or intentions.
Concrete work completed this turn: files read, edits made, commands run. NOT plans or intentions.

artifacts.description: Semantic code artifacts extracted from source files. Each artifact must specify which uncertainty category it reduces.

sourcePath.description: File path where this artifact was found

kind.description: What type of code construct this represents

name.description: Name of the artifact (function name, class name, etc.)

signature.description: Full type signature (e.g., 'async run(params: RunParams): Promise<Result>')

modifies.description: Side effects: state, files, globals this touches (e.g., ["this._items", "fs:config.json", "db:users"])

calls.description: Call graph: significant functions this invokes (e.g., ["llm.complete", "tools.execute"])

insight.description: Non-obvious info NOT derivable from name/signature (e.g., "Retries 3x with exponential backoff")

reduces.description: Which uncertainty category this artifact reduces: structural (what exists), relational (what connects), behavioral (what happens), contractual (what's promised)

awaitingUserInput.description: Set to true when asking the user a question and waiting for their response
